title: Add dynamic marker injection from learned slang into languageMarkers

context_files.reason: Current languageMarkers structure and dynamic marker injection requirements

acceptance_criteria: getDynamicMarkers(language) returns learned slang words as marker arrays
addDynamicMarker(word, language) adds a learned word to runtime-accessible markers
hasDynamicMarker(text, language) checks against both static and dynamic markers
Exported DYNAMIC_MARKERS constant is mutable and accessible to conversationLearner
Existing static marker arrays (INDONESIAN_MARKERS, ENGLISH_MARKERS, DUTCH_MARKERS) unchanged
Existing hasMarker() function still works identically for statics
